title: Can a Plant-Based Diet Improve Your Type 2 Diabetes?
title_en: Can a Plant-Based Diet Improve Your Type 2 Diabetes?
description: A new 16-week study tests whether a low-fat, plant-based diet can improve type 2 diabetes.
description_en: A new 16-week study tests whether a low-fat, plant-based diet can improve type 2 diabetes.
h1: Can a Plant-Based Diet Improve Your Type 2 Diabetes?
h1_en: Can a Plant-Based Diet Improve Your Type 2 Diabetes?
paragraphs: A new 16-week study tests whether a low-fat, plant-based diet can improve type 2 diabetes.

Research has demonstrated that this approach can enhance blood sugar control, promote weight loss, and reduce the risk of diabetes-related complications. Are you ready to take control of your diabetes management journey?

We are no longer accepting applicants for this study. Please explore the Physicians Committee website for more information about a plant-based approach to diabetes and stay tuned for future opportunities to participate in our research. Thank you again for your interest.
Prevention starts today. Join the 21-Day Vegan Kickstart.
Food for Life classes teach you how to improve your health with a plant-based diet.
